title: aster oligocephalus
intro: Aster oligocephalus, also known as the few-headed aster, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China and India, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster oligocephalus include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its flowers and leaves can also be dried or made into tinctures for further application.
